properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 62/23
 1.ISPS SECURITY INFOMATION NORWEGIAN PORTS
 MARITIME SECURITY LEVEL IS RAISED TO LEVEL 2 FROM 301100 UTC SEP 22 IN THE FOLLOWING NORWEGIAN PORT FACILLITIES.
 NOMON-0001. EQUINORD MONGSTAD
 NOKAS-0059. KAARSTOE GAS PROSSING PLANT
 NOTBO-0001. TJELLBERGODDEN PORT
 NOMLK-0001. HAMMERFEST LNG MELKOEYA
 NOAUK-0002. NYHAMNA GAS PLANT
 NOAVE-0001. NORSEA VESTBASE AVEROEY
 NOSLA-0002. NORSEA TANANGER
 NOLRI-0003.  NORSEA STORD BASE
 NOKSU-0014. NORSEA VESTBASE KRITIANSUND
 NOSSJ-0007. HELGELAND BASE
 NOTAE-0002. CONOCO PHILLIPS BASE TANANGER
 NOSLA-0003. OFFSHORE TERMINAL
 NOHAU-0003. KILLINGOEY SUBSEA AND OFFSHOREBASE
 NOOSL-0011. KONGSHAVN
 NOOSL-0014. SJURSOEYA NORD
 NOOSL-0027. SJURSOEYA SYD CONTAINERTERMINAL
 NOOSL-0015. SJURSOEYA OLJEHAVN
 NOOSL-0010. SOENDRE BEKKELAGSKAI
 NOOSL-0008. KNEPPESKJAERUTSTIKKEREN
 NOOSL-0012. ORMSUND HAVNETERMINAL

  
 SHIPS CALLING AT THESE FACILLITIES SHALL RESPOND WITHOUT DELAY TO THIS CHANGE IN SCURITY LEVEL.
 2.CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 61/2023
